scope.goal: Enforce executable shell assets from Git index metadata.
scope.target: All retained .ai/scripts/**/*.sh assets and required runner declarations
constraints: Do not trust os.access/test -x as repository truth
non_goals: Keep retired generated scripts merely to satisfy mode policy

requirements: All retained shell assets are mode 100755

steps: Classify retained versus retired shell assets
Wire validator as required quick/critical check

results.summary: Classified all 18 tracked shell assets, set 15 retained assets to Git mode 100755, kept 3 generated/retirement candidates out of the retained contract, added an index-based validator, and wired it into the quick/critical gate.
files_changed: Git index modes for 15 retained shell assets
validation_evidence: 15 retained + 3 retirement candidates cover all 18 tracked shell assets
all retained scripts use Git mode 100755
